descriptionShort: Ted Irvine discusses who was the nastiest player on the 1987 Sockeyes.
descriptionLong: Ted Irvine, a member of the 1987 Richmond Sockeyes Centennial Cup championship team, shares his perspective on which teammate or opponent was known for the most aggressive or physical play. This appears to be an interview segment from the 2025 HOF reunion or banner-night commemoration events celebrating the team's legacy.
